product_overview: Vanilla Monitor PWA is a plantation supervisor application for recording vanilla field inspections across a guided multi-step workflow. It supports authenticated access, offline storage of inspection records, and later synchronization to Google Sheets and Google Drive.
core_goals: Sign in to the supervisor portal and access protected app areas
Complete a five-step plantation inspection from start to finish
Save inspection data locally when offline and synchronize it when connectivity returns
Review previously logged inspections and their sync status
View the plantation digital twin map layout

features.name: Supervisor Login
features.description: Allow supervisors to access the application through either the developer credential bypass or Google sign-in.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill in supervisor email -> Fill in password -> Submit the supervisor login form -> See the dashboard
Navigate to / -> Start Google sign-in -> Complete Google authentication -> See the dashboard
Navigate to /dashboard without being signed in -> See the splash page
Navigate to /inspect/step1 without being signed in -> See the splash page

features.name: Multi-Step Plant Inspection
features.description: Guide a supervisor through a five-step inspection form that captures plant identity, botanical details, environmental care data, growth measurements, and final notes with photo capture.
user_flows: Navigate to /inspect/step1 -> Select a zone -> Select a block -> Enter a plant ID -> Proceed to the next step -> See step 2 of the inspection
Navigate to /inspect/step2 -> Enter botanical details -> Proceed to the next step -> See step 3 of the inspection
Navigate to /inspect/step3 -> Enter environmental care details -> Proceed to the next step -> See step 4 of the inspection
Navigate to /inspect/step4 -> Enter growth measurements -> Proceed to the next step -> See step 5 of the inspection
Navigate to /inspect/step5 -> Add notes -> Capture or upload a plant photo -> Submit the inspection -> See the submission complete state
Navigate to /inspect/step1 -> Select a zone -> Select a block -> Enter an invalid plant ID -> Attempt to proceed -> Stay on step 1

features.name: Offline Data Persistence and Sync
features.description: Store completed inspections locally when offline and synchronize queued records to Google Workspace when the app is back online.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Open the sync queue -> Trigger synchronization -> See queued records clear after sync
Navigate to /inspect/step1 -> Complete all inspection steps -> Submit the inspection while offline -> See the inspection saved locally
Navigate to /profile -> Open sync controls -> Trigger synchronization -> See pending records processed after connectivity returns

features.name: Inspection History
features.description: Let supervisors review a historical list of logged inspections and their synchronization status.
user_flows: Navigate to /history -> Review the inspection list -> Open a previous inspection record -> See its stored details and sync status

features.name: Supervisor Profile and Sync Controls
features.description: Provide access to supervisor profile settings and manual sync actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> Review profile information -> Trigger sync from profile -> See the sync status update
Navigate to /profile -> Review sync-related settings -> Return to the dashboard

features.name: Digital Twin Map
features.description: Show the plantation layout on an interactive map so supervisors can visualize the digital twin of the site.
user_flows: Navigate to /digital-twin -> View the plantation map layout -> Pan or inspect the map to understand field placement

routes.description: Landing and Splash page with Google OAuth SSO and developer login bypass.
Supervisor main dashboard showing inspection metrics and offline sync status.
Layout for the 5-step inspection form flow.
Step 1 of inspection - Zone, Block, and Plant ID selection.
Step 2 of inspection - Botanical details (foliage color, flowers, vine condition).
Step 3 of inspection - Environmental care details (watering, soil pH, temperature, humidity).
Step 4 of inspection - Growth parameters (vine height, delta height, dead vines/trees).
Step 5 of inspection - Final submission, notes, and photo capture/upload.
Historic overview of logged inspections with sync statuses.
Supervisor profile page with sync controls and settings.
Leaflet map representing plantation digital twin layout.

features.name: Supervisor Login
features.description: Access the supervisor portal using developer credential bypass or Google SSO.
user_interactions: Click Sign In as Supervisor button
Click Sign in with Google button

features.name: Multi-Step Plant Inspection
features.description: 5-step form to collect detailed crop, environmental, and visual measurements.

features.name: Offline Sync to Google Workspace
features.description: Save submissions locally to IndexedDB while offline and auto-sync when online.
user_interactions: Click Sync queue or trigger sync in Profile page
